stdout:
**Architecture**
- Domain/storage/command/CLI separation is mostly preserved. The new `Assignee` type is in domain, storage still persists through `IssueStore`, and CLI remains string-input oriented.

**Correctness And Invariants**
- Blocking: event fields that use the assignee actor format were left as raw strings, despite the issue requiring “Event fields using the same format follow suit.” [types.rs](</home/vkaskivuo/Projects/just-in-time/.claude/worktrees/agent-bf0034e1/crates/jit/src/domain/types.rs:917>) keeps `IssueClaimed.assignee: String`, [types.rs](</home/vkaskivuo/Projects/just-in-time/.claude/worktrees/agent-bf0034e1/crates/jit/src/domain/types.rs:943>) and [types.rs](</home/vkaskivuo/Projects/just-in-time/.claude/worktrees/agent-bf0034e1/crates/jit/src/domain/types.rs:956>) keep gate event `updated_by: Option<String>`, and [types.rs](</home/vkaskivuo/Projects/just-in-time/.claude/worktrees/agent-bf0034e1/crates/jit/src/domain/types.rs:1007>) keeps release `assignee: String`. Their constructors also accept raw strings at [types.rs](</home/vkaskivuo/Projects/just-in-time/.claude/worktrees/agent-bf0034e1/crates/jit/src/domain/types.rs:1128>), [types.rs](</home/vkaskivuo/Projects/just-in-time/.claude/worktrees/agent-bf0034e1/crates/jit/src/domain/types.rs:1149>), and [types.rs](</home/vkaskivuo/Projects/just-in-time/.claude/worktrees/agent-bf0034e1/crates/jit/src/domain/types.rs:1160>). This leaves a public domain path for malformed assignee-format event data, so assignee validation is not centralized for all same-format fields.

- Met: `Issue.created_at` and `Issue.updated_at` are now `DateTime<Utc>` at [types.rs](</home/vkaskivuo/Projects/just-in-time/.claude/worktrees/agent-bf0034e1/crates/jit/src/domain/types.rs:403>), and storage assigns `Utc::now()` directly in [json.rs](</home/vkaskivuo/Projects/just-in-time/.claude/worktrees/agent-bf0034e1/crates/jit/src/storage/json.rs:407>) and [memory.rs](</home/vkaskivuo/Projects/just-in-time/.claude/worktrees/agent-bf0034e1/crates/jit/src/storage/memory.rs:78>).
- Met: `Issue.assignee` and `GateState.updated_by` use `Option<Assignee>` at [types.rs](</home/vkaskivuo/Projects/just-in-time/.claude/worktrees/agent-bf0034e1/crates/jit/src/domain/types.rs:362>) and [types.rs](</home/vkaskivuo/Projects/just-in-time/.claude/worktrees/agent-bf0034e1/crates/jit/src/domain/types.rs:382>).
- Met: `group_labels` now delegates to shared `parse_label` at [projection.rs](</home/vkaskivuo/Projects/just-in-time/.claude/worktrees/agent-bf0034e1/crates/jit/src/domain/projection.rs:152>).

**Functional Style**
- No blocking issue found. The touched projection code uses `fold`; command code remains pragmatic orchestration around side effects.

**Safety**
- No unsafe code introduced in the reviewed diff. Workspace policy remains compatible with `#![deny(unsafe_code)]`.

**Testing**
- The issue context records `cargo-ci` as passed at `2026-06-25T23:29:09.615995995+00:00`; per instruction, I did not rerun tests.
- New focused unit coverage exists for `Assignee` parsing/serde and timestamp serialization/deserialization at [types.rs](</home/vkaskivuo/Projects/just-in-time/.claude/worktrees/agent-bf0034e1/crates/jit/src/domain/types.rs:2027>).

**Error Handling**
- `AssigneeParseError` is a typed `thiserror` error at [types.rs](</home/vkaskivuo/Projects/just-in-time/.claude/worktrees/agent-bf0034e1/crates/jit/src/domain/types.rs:252>). No new library `unwrap()`/`expect()` issue found outside tests in the reviewed changes.

**CLI Contract**
- No new command surface appears to have been added, so no new `--json` gap was introduced.

**Documentation**
- New public `Assignee` APIs include doc comments and examples. I did not find a new public API missing docs in the touched domain surface.

**Jit Management**
- `./scripts/jit-validate.sh` passed.
- `issue.dependencies` is empty, so there is no prerequisite work to verify.
- `run_history` is empty, so there is no prior review feedback to check.

VERDICT: FAIL
